conversation.text: I want to arrange a demo of CINNOX.
Great! I'd be happy to help arrange a demo. Could I start with your name?
Nice to meet you, Emma! And which company are you with?
Thank you. Could I also get your email address so our team can send you the demo confirmation?
Perfect. And finally, a phone number so our team can reach you to schedule?

Thank you, Emma! I've noted all your details — Emma Laurent, Lyon Digital Agency, emma@lyondigital.com, +33-6-1234-5678. Your demo request has been submitted. Our sales team will reach out shortly to schedule it. Do you have a preferred time — for example, weekday mornings or afternoons?
Yes, any weekday afternoon works for me.
Noted — weekday afternoons. Our team will be in touch very soon to confirm the details. Is there anything specific you'd like to see in the demo?
